name: Casserole Florentine
recipeIngredient: 1 can Condensed Cream of Mushroom Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine cooked spinach, cream of mushroom soup, garlic, dried tarragon, marjoram, salt, and pepper. Spread evenly over noodles or other pasta in a buttered 3-quart flat casserole.
2. Distribute chopped sausage over the spinach mixture and sprinkle with chopped onion on top of the sausage.
3. Blend egg into ricotta cheese.
4. Spread ricotta mixture over the entire top of the casserole.
5. Bake in a preheated 375°F oven for 25 to 30 minutes, or until golden brown. Allow to cool slightly.
6. Top with chopped tomato and parsley.
